name: Paul Peter
headline: Fullstack Software Engineer focused on scalable web systems
marquee: FULLSTACK SYSTEMS, REAL-TIME APPS, AND PRODUCTION WEB SOLUTIONS
subtext: I design and build scalable web applications, from responsive interfaces to backend systems and APIs.

about.content:
I am Paul Peter, also known as **Asterixh**. I am a fullstack software engineer with 4 years of experience building and deploying web applications.

My work spans frontend architecture and backend systems. I build responsive interfaces with React and Next.js, and I design APIs and services with Node.js and Express. I focus on performance, clean code structure, and scalable application design.

I have delivered over 15 projects across 6 clients, including production systems like **Anonfly**, a real-time encrypted messaging platform, **SMS**, a student management system with role-based access and structured data handling, and **Quizeen**, a dynamic quiz engine with complex state management. My work is driven by clear logic, maintainable systems, and measurable results.

hero.quote: I build scalable web applications with clean architecture, fast interfaces, and reliable backend systems.
